65203.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
65203.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! You're welcome!

65204.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
65204.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

65205.title: Forever 80s
65205.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

65206.title: 40 Sad Songs From The 80s
65206.description: You're going to need a full box of tissues for this playlist as we bring you 40 of the saddest songs from the 80s!

65207.title: MTV's Sounds Of 1989!
65207.description: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the first years of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1989!

65208.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
65208.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV80s!

69660.title: ... So 80s!
69660.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
